# mtncloud_workflow (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud workflow (task-set) by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_workflow" "maintenance" {
  name = "nightly-maintenance"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the workflow to look up.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the workflow.
- `platform` (String) Platform filter.
- `type` (String) Workflow type (operation or provision).
- `visibility` (String) Workflow visibility.
